current.summary: Brainstorming vouch mechanism: spec vs syllago vs community ownership, artifact vs people trust dimensions

activeWork.description: Exploring whether vouch/trust mechanism belongs in spec or syllago tooling; planning multi-agent brainstorm on implementation approaches, gaps, and design dimensions (artifacts + people trust)
activeWork.progress: Identified spec/tooling/community boundary question as critical. About to spin up 4 agents to explore: different vouch implementations, gaps, artifact vs people trust balance, and other design considerations. No output yet.

recentDecisions: Vouch mechanism warrants deeper design exploration before implementation
Need to clarify spec ownership vs syllago tooling vs community boundaries
Both artifact trust and people trust are valid design dimensions
nextSteps: Run 4 agent brainstorms on vouch mechanism (implementations, gaps, design space, other considerations)
Synthesize agent findings into design options
Clarify which aspects belong in spec vs syllago vs community

context.notes: User initiated multi-agent brainstorm about vouch mechanism. Key insight: spec/tooling/community boundary is unclear and needs clarification. Assistant was spinning up agents when conversation ended. No code changes in progress; this is pure exploration/design work.
